answer: LiveAgent does not provide API access on its free plan [1][2]. The free tier is restricted to basic features, including a single agent seat, one integration, and seven days of ticket history [1][3]. API access is available on their paid subscription plans [4][5]. You can test the API and all platform features during the 30-day free trial, which requires no credit card [6][7]. The REST API allows for operations such as retrieving agent information, managing conversations, and accessing knowledgebase articles [8].
